Title: AI Consulting and Automation — CTO Advisory
Description: Fractional CTO advisory services covering all AI consulting and automation work requested by Client on a time-and-materials basis. Scope is determined by Client as the engagement progresses and includes AI strategy, vendor evaluation, architecture guidance, implementation oversight, staff enablement, and ad hoc consultation. Billed at $250/hr in 15-minute increments. Invoice issued every Friday for all hours worked Mon–Sun of the prior week.
